cache_write_integrity.description: Cache writes must not publish partial, stale, or corrupt objects when copy, close, abort, or delete races occur.

store_path_security.description: Store paths must avoid traversal, ambiguous legacy encodings, and cross-platform path parsing bugs.

store_resource_lifecycle.description: Readers, writers, transactions, buffers, and staged rows need explicit close, rollback, cleanup, and leak handling.

policy_freshness_time.description: Freshness, TTL, cached timestamps, and clock behavior must be explicit and deterministic.

prodlike_store_compatibility.description: Store changes should preserve behavior across memory, file, object, Redis, and SQLite backends where contracts overlap.
